first_dialog: Oh, hey there kid, I finally got in touch with some of my contacts at the Swapdeck factory and we might actually be able to get you a Swapdeck!
Dude, be quiet, I told you... we're obtaining it through... unofficial methods.
Well first of all, you're going to still have to buy the Swapdeck from the store.
No, because I'm not trying to get fired. Secondly, smuggling it in ain't going to be free, I need $100 up front.
Shhh, I told you, be quiet! And yes, you heard me right, I want 100 bucks up front before I smuggle the Swapdeck in. Rent ain't cheap in the city.
Just discretely leave $100 by the job board outside and I'll get the Swapdeck into the store, do we have a deal?
player_dialog: Okay, okay, so what do I have to do?
What? Aw man, can't you just give it to me?
possible_dialog: Do you have my $100 yet? If not, then get back to mowing lawns.
